title: Can't Help Falling in Love
meaning_summary: Can't Help Falling in Love keeps earning because it functions as both a canonical Elvis song and a permanent romantic standard.
revenue_drivers: Weddings, event use, and emotional playlist placement drive recurring demand.
Its status as a cultural standard creates unusually long revenue life.
Film, covers, and estate-led catalog promotion help reset attention over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes global evergreen consumption, ceremony-driven demand, and strong estate-led catalog monetization.

ownership.master_owner: Estate and legacy rights-holder structure assumed
ownership.publishing_owner: Composition-side rights assumed to be split from performer economics
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No new catalog sale adjustment assumed
ownership.notes: As with many standards, publishing-side value and cover culture materially extend revenue.
